name: Bloomin' Brands, Inc.
business: Bloomin' Brands, Inc. is a casual dining restaurant company with a portfolio of concepts including Outback Steakhouse, Carrabba's Italian Grill, Bonefish Grill, and Fleming's Prime Steakhouse & Wine Bar. As of December 28, 2025, the company owned and operated 967 restaurants and franchised 493 restaurants across 46 states, Guam and 12 countries. Revenue is generated from Company-owned restaurants and through franchise royalties and fees.

exposures.sentence: Our restaurant portfolio includes Outback Steakhouse, Carrabba's Italian Grill, Bonefish Grill and Fleming's Prime Steakhouse & Wine Bar.
We maintain a system to ensure network security and safeguard against data loss.

Our restaurant-level management and team members are largely responsible for the quality of our service. Our guests may be dissatisfied and our sales may decline if we fail to recruit, train and retain managers and team members that effectively implement our business strategy and provide high-quality guest service.
To drive customer engagement, we continue to invest in data and technology infrastructure, including brand websites, digital marketing, online ordering, pay at the table technology and mobile apps.
Our U.S. loyalty program, Dine Rewards, is designed to engage with our loyal guest base and drive incremental traffic.

Our business may be negatively impacted by customer preferences regarding third-party delivery apps and services with which we engage, particularly if the availability, performance and reliability of the apps or services adversely impact customer satisfaction.

our competitors may more successfully implement menu or technology initiatives, such as remote ordering, social media or mobile technology platforms that expedite or enhance the customer experience, or artificial intelligence to develop new customer insights.

catalysts.event: Open approximately six new Outback Steakhouse locations
catalysts.sentence: We opened 15 Outback Steakhouse restaurants during 2025 and plan to open approximately six additional locations in 2026.

catalysts.event: Remodel nearly all Outback Steakhouse restaurants
catalysts.sentence: As a part of this strategy, we plan to remodel nearly all of our Outback Steakhouse restaurants by the end of 2028.

catalysts.event: Expiration of Amended & Restated Holistic Agreement with Out West
catalysts.sentence: The agreement ends on December 27, 2026 or upon the earlier occurrence of certain specified events, including a default in ongoing franchise payment obligations to us or if earnings fall below specified levels, the sale of all or substantially all of Out West's assets or equity, bankruptcy or a liquidation event.
